meta.title: The F-22's first air-to-air kill (and dispelling balloon myths)
meta.description:
On Saturday, an American F-22 Raptor shot down a Chinese surveillance balloon off the coast of South Carolina using an AIM-9X Sidewinder missile. In the days leading up to the intercept, the balloon had traversed the U.S. mainland and portions of Canada, leaving a flood of conspiracy theories in its wake. 

Let's talk facts and dispel some of these myths and misconceptions. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

📱 Follow Alex Hollings on social

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexhollingswrites

Further Reading
Full Write-Up: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/chinese-spy-balloon-answering-all-your-questions-and-dispelling-the-myths/
Balloon coverage from Special Forces vet Steve Balestrieri: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/china-insists-that-its-balloon-was-not-spying-as-us-launches-recovery-operation/
Balloon Coverage II: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/china-is-flying-a-surveillance-balloon-over-sensitive-us-sites-to-collect-information/
China, Taiwan, and US AirPower: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-us-is-increasing-its-presence-in-the-philippines-with-an-eye-to-china/
